commands.review_summary:
The PR adds scoped truncation styling for usage context breakdown names, title tooltips for skill/tool/file names, and a changelog entry crediting the source contribution.

Reproducibility: yes. at source/proof level: the source PR screenshots show the before overflow and after ellipsis/tooltip behavior, and current main lacks the scoped selector and title attributes. I did not run a live browser session in this read-only pass.
commands.review_followup: No repair lane is needed; the replacement branch already addresses the prior review feedback and is ready for normal automerge gating.
